title: AI #174: You’re It
whyItMatters: Fable remains in limbo , with renewed hope that we will get it back soon ( 45% by tomorrow, 69% by July 1 , nice.) The full capabilities post is now available . Alex Bores unfortunately lost narrowly in NY-12, and will not be heading to Congress. There are also plenty of other stories to cover. Some highlights: GLM-5.2 is the new best open model , although…
